maps.name: Playground
maps.desc: Open practice mat with a gentle line, three color zones, and two obstacles.

maps.name: Line Track
maps.desc: Closed black line loop — perfect for line-following programs.

maps.name: FLL Table
maps.desc: Competition-style table with a Base, three mission zones, and a detour wall.

maps.name: Maze
maps.desc: Escape from the bottom-left to the green Goal using the distance sensor.
